parsed.generic_mechanism: Ordered escalation lets each example reinterpret the last; severing that sequence turns serviceable sentences into contextless assertions and converts the ending into misplaced setup.

paraphrased_evidence.A: Concrete examples survive, but sentences and headings arrive in reverse-seeming order; pronouns lose antecedents, conclusions precede setups, and the piece ends on an opening title card.
paraphrased_evidence.B: The chapter builds from shame and conditioned choice through sensory examples and an addiction cycle to a dieting argument and forward instruction, though its late promises become repetitive and overstated.
